trial_of_witchwood.name: The Trial of Witchwood
trial_of_witchwood.description: The heroes must venture into the haunted dungeon of Witchwood and defeat the Chaos Warrior and his goblin minions!
trial_of_witchwood.intro_text: Dark clouds gather over the land as you enter the cursed dungeon of Witchwood. Strange sounds echo through the stone corridors...
trial_of_witchwood.complete_text: Victory! The dungeon has been cleansed. The heroes emerge triumphant from Witchwood!
